name: github-board-tests
description: Tests for github-board (vanilla JS app). Engine tests need no deps; e2e tests need jsdom.

scripts.test: node test/github-board-engine.test.js && node test/github-board-extract.test.js && node test/github-board-e2e-board.test.js && node test/github-board-e2e-splitter.test.js
